surface_verification.justification: Library/tooling change to compliance report GENERATORS (rtm/test-evidence/dashboard/build-dashboard) + a new shared pure helper. No user-experienceable surface (web/cli/api) is touched; verified via unit suites + deterministic regeneration of the artifacts in this repo.

degraded: external LLM review unavailable (no OPENROUTER/GEMINI/OPENAI key) -> Claude-only full code review (review_type: full-review)

behaviors.behavior: normalize_intent keeps canonical tokens, aliases feat->feature/fix->bug, keeps other single short tokens, collapses free-text/empty/over-long -> default
RTM Verification Timeline Type column renders a normalized token (leaked description -> 'change', alias -> canonical)
Build Dashboard Recent-Changes Type column renders a normalized token
Test-Evidence Test Progression renders skip-aware PASS (never FAIL) for a merged-work passed<total gap
RTM per-FR status renders COVERED (never gap-driven FAIL) for a merged-work passed<total gap
PASS (baseline)/COVERED (baseline) path preserved when a known-failures baseline exists
Real open regressions still surface via the triage-deep-link override (unchanged)
Compliance Dashboard links Audit Report unconditionally and Activity Dashboard conditionally
Monorepo compliance artifacts regenerate clean (0 gap-driven FAILs, 0 free-text Type cells, audit-report link present)
behaviors.evidence: manual deterministic regeneration verified: test-evidence FAIL count 0; RTM Type column clean; dashboard Compliance Artifacts table includes Audit Report + Activity Dashboard

behaviors.behavior: WebUI compliance artifacts regenerate clean (same cached generators)
behaviors.note: separate git repo (shipwright-webui); verified by inspection in the paired webui regeneration after cache-sync
